SELEE-DIEJIA.description: Active while having [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold]. Loses 1 [gold]Quantum Superposition[/gold] when triggered.
SELEE-DIEJIA.title: Superposition
SELEE-GONGMING.title: Resonance
SELEE-XINGHUANBAOFA.description:
When [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold] reaches 100, enter [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state and clear [gold]Ring Energy Level[/gold]. [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] lasts 2 turns.
Upon entering [gold]Ring Burst[/gold], gain 6 [gold]Degeneracy Kinetic[/gold]. Attack cards are treated as [gold]Resonance[/gold] attacks, consuming 1 [gold]Degeneracy Kinetic[/gold] and increasing damage by 100%.
When all [gold]Degeneracy Kinetic[/gold] is consumed or the duration ends, exit [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] state and clear all [gold]Degeneracy Kinetic[/gold].
Re-entering [gold]Ring Burst[/gold] while active extends duration by 2 turns and grants 4 [gold]Degeneracy Kinetic[/gold].
SELEE-XINGHUANBAOFA.title: Ring Burst
